headline: Surging U.S. Power Needs Drive Gas Infrastructure Opportunity
summary: US electricity demand is seeing a step-change in growth that the traditional power grid is struggling to accommodate. Midstream players are expanding nat gas pipelines to help meet demand.

raw.headline: Surging U.S. Power Needs Drive Gas Infrastructure Opportunity

headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Kinder Morgan, Raises Price Target to $31
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Brandon Bingham   maintains Kinder Morgan (NYSE:KMI) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $30 to $31.

headline: PGIM Jennison Energy Infrastructure Fund Q4 2025: Who Moved The Needle
summary: The Fund outperformed its index in Q4 2025 led by strong midstream and electrical equipment gains. Read the full analysis for more details.
